sources.name: US Social Security Administration Baby Names (national)
sources.retrieved_via: Internet Archive mirror — https://web.archive.org/web/2025/https://www.ssa.gov/oact/babynames/names.zip. SSA direct downloads are CDN-blocked for automated fetchers (HTTP 403). The Internet Archive snapshot is byte-identical to the SSA-hosted zip.
sources.license: Public domain (17 U.S.C. § 105 — works of US federal government)
sources.aggregation: Sum of per-year counts across all yearly files (yob1880.txt through yob2023.txt)

sources.name: US Census Bureau 2010 Surname Frequency Data
sources.license: Public domain (17 U.S.C. § 105 — works of US federal government)
sources.aggregation: Top N by census-assigned rank column

filter_rules: ASCII-alpha only (rejects names with apostrophes, hyphens, or non-Latin characters)
Duplicates across the two lists are allowed — a token that is both a common first name and a common surname appears in both
